response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, which aligns well with the job's core requirements. His work with PostgreSQL, AWS, and Kubernetes is a notable plus, though his recent roles skew toward senior-level responsibilities rather than entry-level. His open-source contributions and leadership in building scalable systems demonstrate depth and pragmatism.
strengths: Extensive fullstack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Strong background in scalable systems and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes)
Proven track record of building and maintaining complex platforms with clean architecture
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level role; may seek higher compensation or growth opportunities
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (mostly MongoDB and MySQL)
Recent roles focus on senior-level responsibilities rather than progressive growth from entry-level
